positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a majestic forest silhouette against a vibrant sunset sky. The main subjects include towering stylized pine trees, delicate bioluminescent mushrooms clustered at the base, and subtly glowing fox paw prints leading through the foreground foliage. The composition must be highly central and balanced, with deep, rich indigo, burnt orange, and emerald green color gradients dominating the scene. Use strong graphic outlines and clean, vector-like lines for maximum print fidelity. Aspect ratio 1:1, suitable for screen printing on apparel.
negative: blurry, grainy, watermark, text, signature, low resolution, messy, noise, artifacts, bokeh, poor anatomy, extra limbs, cropped, logo, trademark, character, people, faces
